descriptionFreeListings: You can renew your listing yourself by clicking the “Extend” option. If the listing is inactive or less than 1 month remain before it expires, it will automatically be extended by 1 month, starting from today.
title: Listing payments
tooltipFreeExtend: You can extend an active listing only when less than 1 month remain before it expires.
